children.heading: Creation of Trust Fund
children.label: a Creation of Trust Fund
children.text: There is established in the Treasury of the United States a trust fund to be known as the “Patient-Centered Outcomes Research Trust Fund” (hereafter in this section referred to as the “PCORTF”), consisting of such amounts as may be appropriated or credited to such Trust Fund as provided in this section and section 9602(b).

children.label: A
children.text: For fiscal year 2010, $10,000,000.

children.label: B
children.text: For fiscal year 2011, $50,000,000.

children.label: C
children.text: For fiscal year 2012, $150,000,000.

children.label: i
children.text: an amount equivalent to the net revenues received in the Treasury from the fees imposed under subchapter B of chapter 34 (relating to fees on health insurance and self-insured plans) for such fiscal year; and

children.label: i
children.text: an amount equivalent to the net revenues received in the Treasury from the fees imposed under subchapter B of chapter 34 (relating to fees on health insurance and self-insured plans) for such fiscal year; and

children.label: i
children.text: an amount equivalent to the net revenues received in the Treasury from the fees imposed under subchapter B of chapter 34 (relating to fees on health insurance and self-insured plans) for such fiscal year; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the applicable amount (as defined in paragraph (4)) for the fiscal year.

children.heading: Trust Fund transfers
children.label: 2 Trust Fund transfers
children.text: In addition to the amounts appropriated under paragraph (1), there shall be credited to the PCORTF the amounts transferred under section 1183 of the Social Security Act.

children.label: A
children.text: any provision of law which is not contained or referenced in this chapter or in a revenue Act, and

children.label: B
children.text: whether such provision of law is a subsequently enacted provision or directly or indirectly seeks to waive the application of this paragraph.

children.label: A
children.text: for fiscal year 2020, $275,500,000;

children.label: B
children.text: for fiscal year 2021, $285,000,000;

children.label: C
children.text: for fiscal year 2022, $293,500,000;

children.label: D
children.text: for fiscal year 2023, $311,500,000;

children.label: E
children.text: for fiscal year 2024, $320,000,000;

children.label: F
children.text: for fiscal year 2025, $338,000,000;

children.label: G
children.text: for fiscal year 2026, $355,500,000;

children.label: H
children.text: for fiscal year 2027, $363,500,000;

children.label: I
children.text: for fiscal year 2028, $381,000,000; and

children.label: J
children.text: for fiscal year 2029, $399,000,000.

children.heading: Trustee
children.label: c Trustee
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall be a trustee of the PCORTF.

children.heading: Amounts available to the Patient-Centered Outcomes Research Institute
children.label: 1 Amounts available to the Patient-Centered Outcomes Research Institute
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), amounts in the PCORTF are available, without further appropriation, to the Patient-Centered Outcomes Research Institute established under section 1181(b) of the Social Security Act for carrying out part D of title XI of the Social Security Act (as in effect on the date of enactment of such Act).

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The trustee of the PCORTF shall provide for the transfer from the PCORTF of 20 percent of the amounts appropriated or credited to the PCORTF for each of fiscal years 2011 through 2029 to the Secretary of Health and Human Services to carry out section 937 of the Public Health Service Act.

children.heading: Availability
children.label: B Availability
children.text: Amounts transferred under subparagraph (A) shall remain available until expended.

children.label: i
children.text: 80 percent to the Office of Communication and Knowledge Transfer of the Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality (or any other relevant office designated by Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality) to carry out the activities described in section 937 of the Public Health Service Act; and

children.label: ii
children.text: 20 percent to the Secretary to carry out the activities described in such section 937.
the fees received in the Treasury under subchapter B of chapter 34, over
the decrease in the tax imposed by chapter 1 resulting from the fees imposed by such subchapter.

children.heading: Termination
children.label: f Termination
children.text: No amounts shall be available for expenditure from the PCORTF after , and any amounts in such Trust Fund after such date shall be transferred to the general fund of the Treasury.September 30, 2029
